calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-15-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-15-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly from Dept. 206 for the Court to place terms of the settlement on the record. Michael Rossoff, Esq. appeared on behalf of plaintiff who was not present; Defendants, in pro per, were present. Terms of the settlement were recited by Mr. Rossoff. $3,000 will be waived if defendants vacate premises by 11/21/04. If outstanding rent not paid timely, then default will be entered against defendants.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/ R. Edwards, CSR: Tony Vauhn # 6185.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
